output.code:
# Let's open the uploaded file to inspect its exact contents
path = "/mnt/data/file-6niy86d8Nf8tee9fiHwaL4-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    text = f.read()
len(text), text[:5000]

import re

text = text

# find hadith content
m = re.search(r'قال رسول الله[^:\n]*:\s*"(.*?)"', text, flags=re.S)
hadith_span = None
if m:
    start = m.start(1)
    end = m.end(1)
    hadith_text = text[start:end]
    # strip edge punctuation if present at start or end per rule (but start char is Arabic letter "إ")
    # Remove trailing edge punctuation characters if they are one of . , ! ? … Arabic ones؟ ؛ ، .
    # Only at the edges
    edge_punct = '.,!؟؛،…'
    # Strip from end
    while end > start and text[end-1] in edge_punct + ' ':
        # But only count punctuation, not spaces inside. We'll just remove spaces at end too
        end -= 1
    hadith_text2 = text[start:end]
    hadith_span = (start, end, hadith_text2)
hadith_span

full_ayah = "وَإِذْ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلْمَلَائِكَةِ إِنِّي خَالِقٌ بَشَرًا مِنْ طِينٍ"
trunc_ayah = "وَإِذْ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلْمَلَائِكَةِ إِنِّي خَ"

# Find all non-overlapping occurrences of full_ayah
full_spans = [ (m.start(), m.end(), m.group(0)) for m in re.finditer(re.escape(full_ayah), text) ]
len(full_spans), full_spans[:3]

# Find all occurrences of trunc_ayah
trunc_matches = [ (m.start(), m.end(), m.group(0)) for m in re.finditer(re.escape(trunc_ayah), text) ]

# Filter out any occurrence that exactly equals the start of a full ayah occurrence (i.e., within a full span where start<=start<end)
filtered_trunc = []
for s,e,g in trunc_matches:
    in_full = any(fs <= s < fe for fs,fe,_ in full_spans)
    if not in_full:
        filtered_trunc.append((s,e,g))
len(trunc_matches), trunc_matches[-3:], filtered_trunc

s, e, had_text = hadith_span
print(text[s-5:s], "|", text[s:e], "|", text[e:e+5].replace("\n","\\n"))

import json

citations = []

# hadith
if hadith_span:
    s,e,txt = hadith_span
    citations.append({
        "span_start": s,
        "span_end": e,
        "span_text": txt,
        "citation_type": "Hadeeth"
    })

# add all full ayah spans
for s,e,txt in full_spans:
    citations.append({
        "span_start": s,
        "span_end": e,
        "span_text": txt,
        "citation_type": "Aya"
    })
# add truncated ayah
for s,e,txt in filtered_trunc:
    citations.append({
        "span_start": s,
        "span_end": e,
        "span_text": txt,
        "citation_type": "Aya"
    })

# Sort by span_start
citations = sorted(citations, key=lambda x: x["span_start"])
print(len(citations))
print(json.dumps({"citations": citations}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))

content.text: {"citations":[{"span_start":37,"span_end":269,"span_text":"إن الملائكة تنزل في هذه المساجد، فإذا رأوا أحداً من أمتي قد صلى ركعتين قبل أن يجلس، قالوا: اللهم اغفر له، اللهم ارحمه، اللهم ارض عنه، اللهم اقبل منه، اللهم اكتب له الأجر، اللهم ارفع درجته، اللهم اجعل له خيراً مما ترك، وخلفاً مما خلف","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":275,"span_end":345,"span_text":"وَإِذْ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلْمَلَائِكَةِ إِنِّي خَالِقٌ بَشَرًا مِنْ طِينٍ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":349,"span_end":419,"span_text":"وَإِذْ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلْمَلَائِكَةِ إِنِّي خَالِقٌ بَشَرًا مِنْ طِينٍ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":423,"span_end":493,"span_text":"وَإِذْ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلْمَلَائِكَةِ إِنِّي خَالِقٌ بَشَرًا مِنْ طِينٍ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":497,"span_end":567,"span_text":"وَإِذْ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلْمَلَائِكَةِ إِنِّي خَالِقٌ بَشَرًا مِنْ طِينٍ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":572,"span_end":642,"span_text":"وَإِذْ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلْمَلَائِكَةِ إِنِّي خَالِقٌ بَشَرًا مِنْ طِينٍ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":647,"span_end":717,"span_text":"وَإِذْ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلْمَلَائِكَةِ إِنِّي خَالِقٌ بَشَرًا مِنْ طِينٍ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":722,"span_end":792,"span_text":"وَإِذْ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلْمَلَائِكَةِ إِنِّي خَالِقٌ بَشَرًا مِنْ طِينٍ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":797,"span_end":867,"span_text":"وَإِذْ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلْمَلَائِكَةِ إِنِّي خَالِقٌ بَشَرًا مِنْ طِينٍ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":872,"span_end":942,"span_text":"وَإِذْ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلْمَلَائِكَةِ إِنِّي خَالِقٌ بَشَرًا مِنْ طِينٍ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":947,"span_end":1017,"span_text":"وَإِذْ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلْمَلَائِكَةِ إِنِّي خَالِقٌ بَشَرًا مِنْ طِينٍ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":1022,"span_end":1068,"span_text":"وَإِذْ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلْمَلَائِكَةِ إِنِّي خَ","citation_type":"Aya"}]}
